title: fix: remove TIER-APP-REVIEW dependency from app-approve
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Rubber stamp ready
gist.blurb: Fixed a tiny hiccup in our app approval workflow. Now, adding the approved label works perfectly every time, even if the review label goes missing.
gist.summary: Removed the dependency on the TIER-APP-REVIEW label for the app approval GitHub Actions workflow to trigger.
gist.impact: Maintainers can now approve community apps more smoothly without workflow skips caused by missing labels.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a rubber stamp to approve a document, while the Nomnom creature eats an old 'review' label. Represents fixing the approval workflow dependency.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a tiny rubber stamp, approving a digital document on a clipboard. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a red 'review' tag nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
